assertions.title: Navigation links route to correct pages

steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:3000/meal-plans, page loaded correctly

steps.action: Click SHOP link in header nav
steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:3000/shop, page loaded correctly

steps.action: Click About Chef Kyla link in Learn dropdown (secondary nav)
steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:3000/about, page loaded correctly

steps.action: Click EXPERIENCES category card link on homepage
steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:3000/experiences, page loaded correctly

steps.action: Click Blog link in footer nav
steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:3000/blog, page loaded correctly

steps.action: Click FAQ link in footer nav
steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:3000/faq, page loaded correctly

steps.action: Click Contact Us link in footer nav
steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:3000/contact, page loaded correctly

evidence.network: All pages loaded with 200 status, no 404 errors

steps.observed: Homepage loaded with all sections visible

steps.action: Click MEAL PLANS link in header main nav
steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:3000/meal-plans, page loaded correctly

steps.action: Click SHOP link in header main nav
steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:3000/shop, page loaded correctly

steps.action: Open Learn dropdown in secondary nav, click About Chef Kyla
steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:3000/about, page loaded correctly

steps.action: Click SOUL GOOD logo to return to homepage, then click EXPERIENCES category card link
steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:3000/experiences, page loaded correctly

steps.action: Open Learn dropdown in secondary nav, click Blog
steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:3000/blog, page loaded correctly

steps.action: Scroll to footer, click FAQ link
steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:3000/faq, page loaded correctly

steps.action: Scroll to footer, click Contact Us link
steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:3000/contact, page loaded correctly

steps.action: Click Sign In link in secondary nav header
steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:3000/account/login, page loaded correctly

evidence.network: All pages loaded successfully, no 404 errors or broken links encountered

frictions.description: The 'Experiences' page is not linked in the header or footer navigation. It is only accessible via a category card on the homepage or by navigating directly to /experiences. Users on other pages cannot reach Experiences without first returning to the homepage.
frictions.resolution: Navigated back to homepage via logo click, then used the EXPERIENCES category card link to reach /experiences

frictions.description: The 'About Chef Kyla' link appears in the Learn dropdown in the secondary nav bar, and also in the footer, causing duplicate elements. When using agent-browser click by ref, the duplicate refs require using JS eval with a specific CSS selector scoped to the secondary navigation to click the correct one.
frictions.resolution: Used document.querySelector with nav[aria-label='Secondary navigation'] scope to target the correct About link

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. All 7 main navigation targets (Meal Plans, Shop, About, Experiences, Blog, FAQ, Contact) route correctly without 404 errors or console errors. Full site navigation path from homepage to all 8 major sections (including Account/Login) completed successfully using header, secondary nav, footer, and homepage category links. No broken links found.
